name: swing-gui-builder
description: Visual drag-and-drop GUI builder for Java Swing in VS Code

scripts.coverage: pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm --dir webview-app test:coverage && pnpm run coverage:badges
scripts.coverage:merge: shx rm -rf .nyc_output coverage/combined && shx mkdir -p .nyc_output coverage/combined && shx cp coverage/coverage-final.json .nyc_output/extension-coverage.json && shx cp webview-app/coverage/coverage-final.json .nyc_output/webview-coverage.json && nyc report --temp-dir .nyc_output --reporter json-summary --report-dir coverage/combined && shx rm -rf .nyc_output
scripts.coverage:badges: shx rm -f media/coverage-badges/*.svg && pnpm run coverage:merge && coverage-badges --config .coveragebadgesrc
scripts.compile: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:webview && pnpm run build:extension
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run compile
scripts.lint: biome check src && pnpm --dir shared lint && pnpm --dir webview-app lint
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src && pnpm --dir shared lint:fix && pnpm --dir webview-app lint:fix
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir shared typecheck && pnpm --dir webview-app typecheck && tsc -p ./ --noEmit

commands.title: Swing GUI Builder: Init Project Config
